acholi.hub.riskscreen_desc_v2: Lim me niang i kom ber bedo + niang i kom kit a AI (pe gin a tic me niang i kom can ada)
acholi.hub.opdef_desc_v2: Lok lok ma pe leng dok ki niang ma neno ki ma porre, ki tic ki dimensions me ABA + Test me Dano ma Oto (AI okonyo, pe gin ma BACB oye ki)
acholi.toast.self_check_deleted: Cito i niang i kom in kene okwanyo
acholi.toast.snapshot_too_large: Snapshot kato ber bedo me ${SNAPSHOT_MAX_ENTRIES.toLocaleString()} cito; kelo opyel.
acholi.toast.snapshot_rejected_entries: Okato woko ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} cito ma rac (timestamp pe tye/pe atir onyo field type pe atir). ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} cito ma atir okany pi loko.
acholi.toast.transcript_no_json: AI pe odwoko lim me cito ma twero a niang.
acholi.toast.transcript_bad_json: AI odwoko JSON ma rac; lakwena coyo transcript ki tem doki.
acholi.toast.transcript_not_array: AI odwoko gin acel keken ma pe lim me cito; ojako pi loko.
acholi.toast.transcript_no_valid_entries: Lim me AI pe tye ki cito me ABC ma atir.
acholi.toast.share_code_too_large: Snapshot dwong adwong pi code me lokorokony (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} letters, kuom 5,000). Tic ki 💾 Gam Snapshot.
acholi.toast.ai_disabled: 🤖 AI otum — yib i komi pi tic gin man
acholi.toast.ai_turned_off: 🤖 AI OTUM — pe gin pa lwak kwan ma bicwala bot Gemini
acholi.toast.ai_turned_on: 🤖 AI OYAB — gin pa lwak kwan bicwala bot Gemini pi niang
acholi.ui.safety_reflection_checklist_subtitle: Lim me niang i kom ber bedo — pe gin a tic me niang i kom can ma onge tem
acholi.ui.formal_threat_assessment_note: Pi niang i kom can ada, nen protokolo me distrik mami (frameworks me VTA, STAG, onyo NTAC).
acholi.ai.print_disclaimer: Gin ma AI ocako i kom kabedo man tye tam keken, pe yub me ngec me BCBA onyo daktari ma tye ki lic. Mok lok ducu ki neno atir mapwod pe i lwoko ki lwak megwa, twec me IEP, onyo loi.
acholi.ai.toggle_title_on: AI OYAB — gin pa lwak kwan cwala bot Gemini pi niang. Dii pi tum.
acholi.ai.toggle_title_off: AI OTUM — gin pa lwak kwan pe a i browser man. Dii pi yib.
acholi.ai.consent_subtitle: Mapwod pe iyib gin me AI, lakwena kwan ngo ma cwala bot Google Gemini.
acholi.ai.consent_li_abc: Cito ABC (gin ma tye kong, kit, gin ma lubo, teko, lok mucoyo, kabedo) — pi lwak kwan ma tye ka tic
acholi.ai.consent_li_profile: Profile me lwak kwan (teko, ngec, gin ma cwallo, gin ma omito, kony, lok)
acholi.ai.consent_li_obs: Mok madwong me cokke me niang ki lok pa cokke me ki kome
acholi.ai.consent_li_codename: Nying mukan ma iyero pi lwak kwan (PE nying ada makato ka in iciyo)
acholi.ai.consent_li_no_other_students: Lok pa lwak kwan mukene ma pe gin ma tye ka tic
acholi.ai.consent_li_no_cloud_creds: Lic ni me Firebase/cloud, account me cukul, onyo niang me jami
acholi.ai.consent_li_no_real_names: Nying ada me lwak kwan (ka in pe iciyo i field me nying mukan)
acholi.ai.consent_ferpa_note: Po wii FERPA: pe icoy nying ada me lwak kwan i BehaviorLens. Tic ki nying mukan (lapor "Otter Ma Tek"). Itwero juko niang man kare ducu ka iyii toggle me AI i komi.
acholi.ai.consent_decline_aria: Kwer — wek AI me bedo otum
acholi.confirm.remove_counter: Kwany counter man? Ibirwenyo ${count} acoyo ma pe okany onge me kome session.
acholi.confirm.delete_goal: Kwany ${label}? Tic man pe twero dwoko cen.
acholi.confirm.remove_contact: Kwany "${label}" ki i tic me cwer cwiny? Tic man pe twero dwoko cen.
acholi.confirm.delete_self_check: Kwany niang i komi me ${when}? Tic man pe twero dwoko cen.
acholi.maintenance.probe_schedule_label_v2: Mitamboli me probe me gwoko ma atir me ABA

haitian_creole.hub.riskscreen_desc_v2: Lis verifikasyon refleksyon sou sekirite + deteksyon modèl ak AI (se pa yon zouti evalyasyon menas fòmèl)
haitian_creole.hub.opdef_desc_v2: Konvèti deskripsyon ki pa klè an definisyon ki ka obsève epi mezire lè w sèvi ak dimansyon estanda ABA + Tès Moun Mouri (AI ede, se pa yon pwodwi BACB sètifye)
haitian_creole.toast.self_check_deleted: Antre tcheke pwòp tèt ou efase
haitian_creole.toast.snapshot_too_large: Snapshot la depase limit sekirite ${SNAPSHOT_MAX_ENTRIES.toLocaleString()} antre yo; refize enpòtasyon an.
haitian_creole.toast.snapshot_rejected_entries: Yo sote ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} antre ki defektye (timestamp manke/pa valab oswa kalite jaden ki pa korèk). Yo kenbe ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} antre ki valab pou revize.
haitian_creole.toast.transcript_no_json: AI a pa retounen yon lis antre ki ka analize.
haitian_creole.toast.transcript_bad_json: AI a retounen JSON defektye; tanpri refòmile transkripsyon an epi eseye ankò.
haitian_creole.toast.transcript_not_array: AI a retounen yon sèl objè olye de yon lis antre; anbalije pou revize.
haitian_creole.toast.transcript_no_valid_entries: Lis AI a pa te genyen okenn antre ABC valab.
haitian_creole.toast.share_code_too_large: Snapshot la twò gwo pou kòd pataj (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} karaktè, limit 5,000). Itilize 💾 Telechaje Snapshot olye.
haitian_creole.toast.ai_disabled: 🤖 AI etenn — limen li nan tèt la pou itilize fonksyon sa a
haitian_creole.toast.ai_turned_off: 🤖 AI ETENN — okenn done elèv p ap voye bay Gemini
haitian_creole.toast.ai_turned_on: 🤖 AI ALIME — y ap voye done elèv yo bay Gemini pou analize
haitian_creole.ui.safety_reflection_checklist_subtitle: Lis verifikasyon refleksyon sou sekirite — se pa yon zouti evalyasyon menas ki valide
haitian_creole.ui.formal_threat_assessment_note: Pou evalyasyon menas fòmèl, gade pwotokòl distri ou a (kad VTA, STAG, oswa NTAC).
haitian_creole.ai.print_disclaimer: Kontni AI te jenere nan seksyon sa a se yon estimasyon eristik, se pa jijman pwofesyonèl yon BCBA oswa yon klinisyen ki gen lisans. Verifye tout reklamasyon yo atravè obsèvasyon dirèk anvan w pataje ak paran yo, ekip IEP yo, oswa administratè yo.
haitian_creole.ai.toggle_title_on: AI ALIME — y ap voye done elèv yo bay Gemini pou analize. Klike pou etenn.
haitian_creole.ai.toggle_title_off: AI ETENN — okenn done elèv pa kite navigatè sa a. Klike pou aktive.
haitian_creole.ai.consent_subtitle: Anvan w limen fonksyon AI yo, tanpri li sa yo voye bay Google Gemini.
haitian_creole.ai.consent_li_abc: Antre ABC (anteseden, konpòtman, konsekans, entansite, nòt, anviwònman) — pou elèv aktif la
haitian_creole.ai.consent_li_profile: Pwofil elèv (fòs, enterè, deklanche, objektif, akomodasyon, nòt)
haitian_creole.ai.consent_li_obs: Rezime sesyon obsèvasyon ak nòt sesyon resan
haitian_creole.ai.consent_li_codename: Non kòd ou chwazi pou elèv la (SE PA non reyèl la sof si w te tape youn)
haitian_creole.ai.consent_li_no_other_students: Done nenpòt elèv ki pa aktif la
haitian_creole.ai.consent_li_no_cloud_creds: Kredansyèl Firebase/cloud ou, kont lekòl, oswa idantifyan aparèy
haitian_creole.ai.consent_li_no_real_names: Vrè non elèv yo (sof si w te tape youn nan chan non kòd la)
haitian_creole.ai.consent_ferpa_note: Rapèl FERPA: pa tape vrè non elèv yo nan BehaviorLens. Itilize yon non kòd (egzanp "Otter Brave"). Ou ka revoke konsantman sa a nenpòt lè lè w klike sou switch AI nan tèt la.
haitian_creole.confirm.remove_counter: Retire kontè sa a? Ou pral pèdi ${count} mak ki pa sove kòm yon sesyon.
haitian_creole.confirm.delete_goal: Efase ${label}? Aksyon sa a pa ka anile.
haitian_creole.confirm.remove_contact: Retire "${label}" nan plan kriz la? Aksyon sa a pa ka anile.
haitian_creole.confirm.delete_self_check: Efase tchek pwòp tèt ou nan ${when}? Aksyon sa a pa ka anile.

chin_falam.hub.riskscreen_desc_v2: Himnak khan ngaihtoknak hawl + AI in mui hmuhthlamhnak (cu cu hmasawn hrenh kha mikip aa awknak hriam a si lo)
chin_falam.hub.opdef_desc_v2: Ngandam lo hngakchia kha ABA ABCD bantuk + Mithi Pa Sungsuk hmankha hmuhmi le tahmi ngandamnak ah lehzin (AI bawmh, BACB in cohlanmi a si lo)
chin_falam.toast.snapshot_too_large: Snapshot cu ${SNAPSHOT_MAX_ENTRIES.toLocaleString()} luhpinhnak himnak kuamhrang kal cangmi a si; chuhtutnak laksawng cang.
chin_falam.toast.snapshot_rejected_entries: ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} luhpinhnak phamhmi cu hman cang (caan hman a um lo siloah hmungmi field a hman lo). Sertopnak ah ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} duhmi luhpinhnak khan riahter cang.
chin_falam.toast.transcript_no_json: AI in zilhnak tuah tang i luhpinhnak chun a kirter lo.
chin_falam.toast.transcript_bad_json: AI in JSON phamhmi a kirter; transcript a duhmi piakter law a doh hai tuah.
chin_falam.toast.transcript_not_array: AI in luhpinhnak chun zoah pakhat kha a kirter; sertopnak ah hren cang.
chin_falam.toast.transcript_no_valid_entries: AI chun chu ABC luhpinhnak duhmi a um lo.
chin_falam.toast.share_code_too_large: Snapshot cu chimhthlanak code i a thuk lawk (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} mu, kuamhrang 5,000). 💾 Snapshot Tahnak hman ve.
chin_falam.toast.ai_disabled: 🤖 AI a tang — hi tuahmi hmang nakhnan lu ah ngamtuk
chin_falam.toast.ai_turned_off: 🤖 AI A TANG CANG — sianginn fa ningchung Gemini ah a kalh ti lo
chin_falam.toast.ai_turned_on: 🤖 AI A NGAM CANG — sianginn fa ningchung kalhpaihnak ah Gemini ah kalh hna lai
chin_falam.ui.safety_reflection_checklist_subtitle: Himnak khan ngaihtoknak hawl — hriam cohlanmi hmasawn aa awknak a si lo
chin_falam.ui.formal_threat_assessment_note: Hmasawn aa awknak hriam tuahmi ca, na district i protocol kha zoh (VTA, STAG, asiloah NTAC framework).
chin_falam.ai.print_disclaimer: Hi pawl ah AI in tuahmi a kal cu zilhnak hngalh a si, BCBA asiloah cohlanmi clinical paw thazaar hngalh a si lo. Sertopnak ah a mawhmi paw cu nupa, IEP team, asiloah hriampaw he chimhthla hlanah a hmuhmi in fianter.
chin_falam.ai.toggle_title_on: AI A NGAM — sianginn fa ningchung kalhpaihnak ah Gemini ah a kalh. Tihthal ah click tuah.
chin_falam.ai.toggle_title_off: AI A TANG — sianginn fa ningchung hi browser thawng a chuah lo. Hman ah click tuah.
chin_falam.ai.consent_subtitle: AI hmangtonak ngam hlanah, Google Gemini ah a kalhmi paw kha hlatlh.
chin_falam.ai.consent_li_abc: ABC luhpinhnak (a hmasamthlak, tuahsernak, tu lawi paw, thazang, tialnak, kuam) — siangin a hman fa ningchung ca
chin_falam.ai.consent_li_profile: Siangin fa profile (thazang, lungtanmi, tuah nakhnan paw, duhmi, bawmhnak, tialnak)
chin_falam.ai.consent_li_obs: Hmuhmi kuam tu zumhnak le tu cawi tialnak
chin_falam.ai.consent_li_codename: Siangin ca na thlangmi rumhnak min (na thuh ahcuah si lo paw cu hman min a si lo)
chin_falam.ai.consent_li_no_other_students: Tu hmang sianginn fa rangah sianginn fa thlawnnak ningchung
chin_falam.ai.consent_li_no_cloud_creds: Na Firebase/cloud aa hngalhter, sianginn account, asiloah hmangmi aa hngalhter
chin_falam.ai.consent_li_no_real_names: Sianginn fa hman min (rumhnak min field ah na thuh ahcuah si)
chin_falam.ai.consent_ferpa_note: FERPA hngahter: BehaviorLens ah sianginn fa hman min thuh hlah. Rumhnak min hman (tahchunhnak "Otter Ralthuam"). Lu i AI toggle ah click tuah in hi cohlannak cu zeicang lai tuah loh khawh.
chin_falam.confirm.remove_counter: Hi tehfung tihthal? Session ah riahter lomi ${count} pin kha tuksak lai.
chin_falam.confirm.delete_goal: ${label} pheh? Hi tuahmi cu a kirter khawh lo.
chin_falam.confirm.remove_contact: Buainak tinhnak chun "${label}" tihthal? Hi tuahmi cu a kirter khawh lo.
chin_falam.confirm.delete_self_check: ${when} chun mahte-i-hawlchunghnak pheh? Hi tuahmi cu a kirter khawh lo.

chin_hakha.toast.transcript_not_array: AI in luhter chun chu pakhat kha a kirter; sertopnak ca i hreng cang.
chin_hakha.toast.transcript_no_valid_entries: AI chun chu ABC luhter duhmi a um lo.

chin_hakha.toast.ai_disabled: 🤖 AI a tang — lu ah ngamtuk law hi tuahmi hman
chin_hakha.toast.ai_turned_off: 🤖 AI A TANG — sianginn fa ningchung Gemini ah kalh tunge lo
chin_hakha.toast.ai_turned_on: 🤖 AI A NGAM — sianginn fa ningchung kalhpaihnak ca Gemini ah a kalh

chin_hakha.ai.toggle_title_off: AI A TANG — sianginn fa ningchung hi browser chun a chuah lo. Hman ah click tuah.

karen.toast.snapshot_too_large: Snapshot ထဲ ${SNAPSHOT_MAX_ENTRIES.toLocaleString()} တၢ်ဂံၢ်ဆုၣ်ပူၤဖျဲးအတၢ်ပယၤ; ဖို်ၤထီၣ်ပှ့ၤလီၤ။
karen.toast.snapshot_rejected_entries: ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} တၢ်ဂံၢ်ဆုၣ်အၢ်ဘၣ်ထဲ (နၤနၤတၢ်ပနီၣ်တအိၣ်/တဘၣ်ဘၣ် မ့တမ့ၢ်တၢ်ဂ့ၢ်အကလုၢ်တဘၣ်)။ တၢ်သမံသမိးပူၤ ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} တၢ်ဂံၢ်ဆုၣ်လၢအိၣ်ဖျါတၢ်တီတၢ်လီၤထီၣ်ပၢၤထီၣ်။
karen.toast.transcript_bad_json: AI ကီၢ်ဆၢက့ၤ JSON လၢအၢ်ဘၣ်ထဲ; ဝံသးစူၤ ဆ့ၢ်က့ၤနၤနၤ transcript ဒီးမၤကွၢ်တကီာ်ပူၤ။
karen.toast.transcript_no_valid_entries: AI အလီၢ်အပူၤ ABC တၢ်ဂံၢ်ဆုၣ်လီၤထီၣ်တအိၣ်ဘၣ်။
karen.toast.share_code_too_large: Snapshot အ့ၣ်ဒိၣ်တ့ၢ်လၢ တၢ်ဟ့ၢ်လီၤလၢၤ code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} လုၢ်လၢ်, တၢ်ပယၤ 5,000)။ မၤကွၢ်ထီၣ် 💾 ထူၣ်ဆှၢလီၤ Snapshot အလီၢ်အလီၢ်။
karen.toast.ai_turned_off: 🤖 AI မ့ၤထီၣ်ပူၤ — တၢ်ဂံၢ်ဆုၣ်လၢ ဖိၣ်ကိၢ်တအၢၣ်လီၤ Gemini ဘၣ်
karen.ui.formal_threat_assessment_note: လၢ ပိၢ်ပျၢ်တၢ်ပိၢ်ထံၣ်က့ၤ, ထံၣ်နဲၣ်နကီၢ်ပူၤ protocol (VTA, STAG, မ့တမ့ၢ် NTAC framework)။
karen.ai.toggle_title_off: AI မ့ၤထီၣ် — ဖိၣ်ကိၢ်အတၢ်ဂံၢ်ဆုၣ်တထီၣ်ထဲ ဒီတ browser ပူၤလၢၤ။ Click မၤပှ့ၢ်ပူၤ။
karen.ai.consent_subtitle: AI တၢ်မၤလၢၤပူၤပှ့ၢ်ပူၤ, ဝံသးစူၤ ဖးနၢ်ပၢၢ်က့ၤလၢ Google Gemini ဘၣ်တၢ်လီၤပှ့ၤ။
karen.ai.consent_what_sent_heading: Gemini ဘၣ်ထီၣ်လီၤပှ့ၤ
karen.ai.consent_li_obs: တၢ်ပိၢ်ထံၣ်က့ၤ ပိၢ်ထဲကိၢ်အကီၢ်ပူၤ ဒီးနၤနၤ session အကီၢ်ပူၤ
karen.ai.consent_li_codename: ဖိၣ်ကိၢ်အ codename လၢနၤနီကိၢ်ဆၢ (တမ့ၢ်တၢ်လီၤလီၤ မ့မ့ၢ်နၤနၤနၤနၤ)
karen.ai.consent_li_no_cloud_creds: နၤနၤ Firebase/cloud ဘၣ်တၢ်လီၢ်လီၢ်, ကီၣ်ဒၢ account, မ့တမ့ၢ်နၤနၤပိၢ်ပျၢ်အလီၢ်
karen.ai.consent_li_no_real_names: ဖိၣ်ကိၢ်အလီၤလီၤနၤနၤ (မ့မ့ၢ်နၤနၤ codename field ပူၤ)
karen.ai.consent_ferpa_note: FERPA ဂံၢ်ဆုၣ်: BehaviorLens ပူၤ ဖိၣ်ကိၢ်အလီၤလီၤနၤနၤ နၤနၤပူၤလၢၤနၤ။ codename လီၤ (တၢ်အဒိ "Otter Brave")။ ဒီတၢ်ပိၢ်လီၤပူၤ AI toggle မၤထီၣ်ပိၢ်ထံၣ်ထီၣ်လီၢ်လီၢ်တၢ်ပတဲာ်ဖးက့ၤ။
